positioning.statement: For Dutch mid-market and growth companies navigating strategic complexity, Strategic Popoltastic is the boutique strategy consultancy that delivers Bain/BCG-grade strategy audits and market positioning with a co-creative, human-centered approach — because strategy that isn't understood and adopted by the people who execute it is just a deck collecting dust.
positioning.differentiator: Combines top-tier analytical rigor with Rule of Three market structure expertise and co-creative partnership model
positioning.audience: CEOs, founders, and board members of Dutch mid-market companies (€10M-€500M revenue)

coreNarrative.title: Read the market. Find your edge.
coreNarrative.story:
Every market eventually organizes into a handful of generalists and a fringe of specialists. Most mid-market companies don't know which they are — or should be. They chase growth without understanding their structural position, scatter strategic initiatives without a unifying direction, and build strategies that exist in spreadsheets but not in the minds of the people executing them.

Strategic Popoltastic exists to cut through that fog. We bring the analytical frameworks of the world's best strategy houses — applied with the directness and co-creative spirit that Dutch business culture demands. We don't hand you a strategy in a deck and walk away. We help you see your market clearly, choose your position deliberately, and build a direction that your entire organization can understand and execute.

The result: companies that know exactly where they stand, where they're going, and why — with the coherence that research shows makes them 3x more likely to outgrow their peers.
coreNarrative.tone: Direct, analytical, confident without being arrogant. Dutch pragmatism meets consulting rigor.

elevatorPitch.30sec: Strategic Popoltastic helps Dutch mid-market companies recalibrate their strategy. We use the Rule of Three framework to reveal your true competitive position, then work co-creatively to build a strategic direction your whole organization can execute. Think Bain-grade analysis, delivered with boutique agility.
elevatorPitch.60sec: Most mid-market companies have strong people, good products, and ambitious plans — but lack a unified strategic direction that everyone understands. Strategic Popoltastic fixes that. We conduct rigorous strategy audits using proven frameworks like the Rule of Three and our proprietary 35-question baseline assessment to identify exactly where you stand. Then we work co-creatively with your leadership team to define where you should be — generalist or specialist, scale or depth — and build a strategy house that connects your initiatives to a clear direction. Research shows coherent companies are 3x more likely to outgrow peers. We make companies coherent.
